title: Even or Odd
description: Check if a number is even or odd using the modulo operator and if/else.
problemStatement:
Make decisions! Write a program that takes an integer input from the user and prints whether it is `"Even"` or `"Odd"`.

**Hint:** Use the `%` operator.

**Example Input:** `7` 
**Expected Output:** `7 is Odd`.
hints: If `n % 2 == 0` then it is even, otherwise it is odd.
